creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
===>  Checking if devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap already installed
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/local/include /usr/local/lib
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/qtsoap.h /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapArray /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapArrayIterator /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapHttpTransport /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapMessage /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapNamespaces /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapQName /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapSimpleType /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsi
 ngleapplication/src/QtSoapStruct /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapStructIterator /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapType /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapTypeConstructor /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapTypeConstructorBase /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/QtSoapTypeFactory /usr/local/include
install: /work/a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/src/qtsoap.h: No such file or directory
*** [do-install] Error code 71

Stop in /a/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap.


More details : https://redports.org/~lbartoletti/20131206184046-86386-162730/qt4-qtsolutions-soap-20110722_1.log

Fix: 

qtsoap.h seems to be into devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsoap/src/

You can copy qtsoap/src/* into qtsingleapplication/src/

But, after we got this error :

install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/lib/libQtSolutions_SOAP-head.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libQtSolutions_SOAP-head.so.1
install: /usr/ports/devel/qt4-qtsolutions-soap/work/qt-solutions-qt-solutions/qtsingleapplication/lib/libQtSolutions_SOAP-head.so.1.0.0: No such file or directory
*** [do-install] Error code 71
How-To-Repeat: Try to build devel/qt4-solutions-soap (for me, by build cad/meshlab)
